top_signals.title: Robot nation: China’s bid to beat its demographic decline
top_signals.summary: The country’s workforce is set to fall to 300mn by the end of the century. Beijing wants humanoids to narrow the labour gap
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Keiko Fujimori: Peru’s biggest political loser poised to win election
top_signals.summary: With almost all the ballots counted, Fujimori held 50.12% of the vote, a margin of just over 43,000 over her leftist rival Roberto Sanchez, according to electoral authorities.
